name: skillsmith
description: skillsmith — eval-gated skill optimizer for coding agents (propose → execute your repo's tests in a git worktree → gate → stage).

plugins.name: skillsmith
plugins.description: Eval-gated skill optimizer: propose skill edits, eval by executing your repo's own tests in an isolated git worktree, gate on measured lift, stage. Drives the `skillsmith` binary (on PATH via `cargo install --path .`; `$SKILLSMITH_HOME` optional); nothing live changes until you adopt.
